  export const texts = [{"value":"import { Canvas, Chart, Line, Tooltip } from '@antv/f2';\nconst data = [\n  { genre: 'Sports', sold: 5 },\n  { genre: 'Strategy', sold: 10 },\n  { genre: 'Action', sold: 20 },\n  { genre: 'Shooter', sold: 20 },\n  { genre: 'Other', sold: 40 },\n];\n\n<Canvas context={context}>\n  <Chart data={data}>\n    <Tooltip>\n    <Axis field=\"genre\" />\n    <Line x=\"genre\" y=\"sold\" />\n  </Chart>\n</Canvas>;\n","paraId":0,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"边距","paraId":1,"tocIndex":3},{"value":"触发 tooltip 显示事件，默认为 press","paraId":2,"tocIndex":4},{"value":"触发 tooltip 消失事件，默认为 pressend","paraId":3,"tocIndex":5},{"value":"是否一直显示","paraId":4,"tocIndex":6},{"value":"是否显示十字线","paraId":5,"tocIndex":7},{"value":"十字线类型","paraId":6,"tocIndex":8},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":7,"tocIndex":9},{"value":"线条属性","paraId":8,"tocIndex":9},{"value":"十字线样式","paraId":9,"tocIndex":9},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":10,"tocIndex":10},{"value":"文本属性","paraId":11,"tocIndex":10},{"value":"主体名称样式","paraId":12,"tocIndex":10},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":13,"tocIndex":11},{"value":"文本属性","paraId":14,"tocIndex":11},{"value":"主体值样式","paraId":15,"tocIndex":11},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":16,"tocIndex":12},{"value":"通用属性","paraId":17,"tocIndex":12},{"value":"主体背景样式","paraId":18,"tocIndex":12},{"value":"xTip 中显示的 text 定义","paraId":19,"tocIndex":13},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":20,"tocIndex":14},{"value":"文本属性","paraId":21,"tocIndex":14},{"value":"xTip 中字体样式","paraId":22,"tocIndex":14},{"value":"类型为绘图属性：","paraId":23,"tocIndex":15},{"value":"通用属性","paraId":24,"tocIndex":15},{"value":"xTip 中背景样式","paraId":25,"tocIndex":15},{"value":"是否显示","paraId":26,"tocIndex":16},{"value":"tooltip 选中数据发生改变时的回调函数","paraId":27,"tocIndex":17},{"value":"可通过获取 ref 调用","paraId":28,"tocIndex":18},{"value":"在 x，y 处显示 tooltip 组件","paraId":29,"tocIndex":19},{"value":"隐藏 tooltip 组件","paraId":30,"tocIndex":20}];
