  export const texts = [{"value":"用于绘制点图、折线图中的点等, 继承自 ","paraId":0},{"value":"几何标记 Geometry","paraId":1},{"value":"import { Canvas, Chart, Point } from '@antv/f2';\nconst data = [\n  { genre: 'Sports', sold: 5 },\n  { genre: 'Strategy', sold: 10 },\n  { genre: 'Action', sold: 20 },\n  { genre: 'Shooter', sold: 20 },\n  { genre: 'Other', sold: 40 },\n];\n\n<Canvas context={context}>\n  <Chart data={data}>\n    <Point x=\"genre\" y=\"sold\" />\n  </Chart>\n</Canvas>;\n","paraId":2,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"几何标记统一 Props 详见：","paraId":3,"tocIndex":1},{"value":"几何标记","paraId":4,"tocIndex":1},{"value":"几何标记统一方法 详见：","paraId":5,"tocIndex":2},{"value":"几何标记","paraId":6,"tocIndex":2}];
