  export const texts = [{"value":"组件结构基本保持和 React 一致，如果你了解 React ，相信你一看就会","paraId":0},{"value":"import { Component } from '@antv/f2';\n\nclass Hello extends Component {\n  constructor(props) {\n    super(props);\n  }\n  willMount() {}\n  didMount() {}\n  shouldUpdate() {\n    return true;\n  }\n  willReceiveProps(props) {}\n  willUpdate() {}\n  didUpdate() {}\n  render() {\n    const { color } = this.props;\n    return <rect attrs={{ x: 10, y: 10, width: 10, height: 10, fill: color }} />;\n  }\n  didUnmount() {}\n}\n","paraId":1,"tocIndex":0},{"value":"import { Canvas } from '@antv/f2';\nimport Hello from './hello';\n\n<Canvas>\n  <Hello color=\"red\" />\n</Canvas>;\n","paraId":2,"tocIndex":1}];
